title: rubus × leynhacensis
intro: Rubus × leynhacensis, also known as the Lyon raspberry or Lyon hybrid, is a cross between the fragaria and rubus species, resulting in a unique hybrid plant with characteristics from both parents. The medicinal properties of Rubus × leynhacensis include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and other polyphenolic compounds. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × leynhacensis include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced cognitive function, and a reduced risk of certain cancers, due to its rich antioxidant profile. Rubus × leynhacensis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible way to incorporate its health benefits into one's daily routine.
